ns0:entry.ns0:title: CuteLeaf/Firefly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CuteLeaf/Firefly
Language: astro
流萤，清新美观的 Astro 静态博客主题模板 | Firefly, fresh and aesthetic Astro blog theme template, Secondary development based on Fuwari.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gothsec/Astro-portfolio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gothsec/Astro-portfolio
Language: astro
Portfolio template built with Astro, React, TypeScript and TailwindCSS. (Handcrafted with Figma)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lissy93/awesome-privacy
Language: astro
🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NebulaServices/Nebula
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NebulaServices/Nebula
Language: astro
a stunning and sleek web proxy with support for hundreds of popular sites.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
Language: astro
A modern, minimalist portfolio template built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Perfect for developers looking to showcase their skills, experience, and projects in a clean, professional way.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitbonsai/mcpvault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault
Language: astro
A lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for safe Obsidian vault access

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hilmanski/freeStuffDev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hilmanski/freeStuffDev
Language: astro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: saicaca/fuwari
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari
Language: astro
✨A static blog template built with Astro.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: satnaing/astro-paper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/satnaing/astro-paper
Language: astro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: starwind-ui/starwind-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/starwind-ui/starwind-ui
Language: astro
shadcn/ui for Astro. 45+ animated and accessible components. Install via CLI. Own the code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: treefarmstudio/odyssey-theme
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/treefarmstudio/odyssey-theme
Language: astro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zeon-studio/astroplate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zeon-studio/astroplate
Language: astro
Astroplate is a free starter template built with Astro, TailwindCSS & TypeScript providing everything you need to jumpstart your Astro project. Get started with Astroplate and save yourself hours of work!
